name: Kirill Gerstein
abstract: Kirill Gerstein (Russian: Кирилл Герштейн) (born 23 October 1979) is a Russian-American concert pianist. He is the sixth recipient of the Gilmore Artist Award.

concerts.label: East and West Artists Audition Winners

about_quotes.speaker: Phil Wilson
about_quotes.evidence: Then you have Makoto Ozone and Kirill Gerstein coming in at the age of twelve and you go oh my God is that unbelievable.
about_quotes.doc_title: Phil Wilson interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, September 27, 2023
